creator: sfarrell@sfarrellhome.almaden.ibm.com
text:
an interrupted system call is signaled when doing an ldap lookup
some percentage of the time.

Fix: This patch is sanctioned by the author (oscar) as the "correct fix".
For some reason this fix is in xemacs-22 (so he claims), but I never
see it in xemacs-21.x.

How-To-Repeat: 
install xemacs & openldap.  do an ldap lookup.
